title: Ch 7.1 — Your First Class: RPG Potion
description:
Create a simple class with fields and a method.

In this problem you'll build a `Potion` class that bundles
state (fields) and behavior (a method) into one object.

──────────────────────────────────────────────
Class: Potion (public)
──────────────────────────────────────────────

  Fields (NOT private — just plain fields for now):
    • String name
    • int healingAmount
    • int price

  Method:
    • String describe()
        returns: "<name> restores <healingAmount> health and costs <price> gold."
        example: "Health Potion restores 50 health and costs 10 gold."

  Constructor:
    • NONE — do NOT write a constructor.
      (We'll set fields directly, like: potion.name = "Health Potion";)

──────────────────────────────────────────────
HINTS
──────────────────────────────────────────────
• This is the simplest kind of class: just fields + a method.
• describe() should RETURN a String, not print it.
• The test will create a Potion with `new Potion()`,
  then set its fields, then call describe().
